description: This Java class implements a stub client for a credit bureau, providing deterministic fake credit scores for testing and development environments. It avoids external service calls and relies on hashing provided identifiers to generate scores.

classes.name: StubCreditBureauClient
classes.description: A stub implementation of CreditBureauClient that generates deterministic credit scores for testing.

methods.name: fetchReport
methods.description: Generates a fake credit bureau report based on the provided request. Returns a report with a deterministic score or a message if identifiers are missing.

methods.name: deterministicScore
methods.description: Computes a deterministic pseudo-credit score by hashing a stable key derived from the request's identifiers.
